overview: An interactive educational website showcasing how Dynamic Programming solves real student challenges — from planning study time to comparing notes to optimizing study order. Features live calculators, DP table visualizations, and algorithm comparisons.
features: Interactive Knapsack calculator for maximizing marks within study time
LCS-based notes similarity checker with similarity percentage
Matrix Chain Multiplication for optimizing study order
DP table visualization for Knapsack algorithm
Student-friendly explanations of Dynamic Programming concepts
